summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Central de Pendências Documentais feature. All 8 test features passed successfully. Backend API tests (16/16 passed) and Frontend UI tests (8/8 passed).
seed_data_creation: 3 test pendências already exist for aluno 'Test_aluno Totvs 542056' with documents: RG-Frente (131), RG-Verso (132), Comprovante de Residência (94)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Central de Pendências Documentais is fully functional. All CRUD operations work correctly. Status flow (Pendente → Aguardando Aluno → Em Análise → Aprovado/Rejeitado/Reenvio Necessário) is working. Contact registration automatically changes status from 'pendente' to 'aguardando_aluno'.

tested_features.TEST_1_Menu_Pendencias_Admin: PASS - Admin sidebar shows 'Pendências' menu item
tested_features.TEST_2_Menu_Pendencias_Assistente: PASS - Assistente sidebar shows 'Pendências' menu item
tested_features.TEST_3_Dashboard_Cards: PASS - Dashboard shows status cards (Pendentes, Aguardando, Em Análise, Reenvio, Aprovados, Críticas)
tested_features.TEST_4_Lista_Pendencias: PASS - Table displays aluno name, documento, curso, status, contatos count, and date
tested_features.TEST_5_Filtro_Status: PASS - Filter by status works correctly
tested_features.TEST_6_Modal_Detalhes: PASS - Details modal shows aluno info, pedido info, documento info, and histórico de contatos
tested_features.TEST_7_Modal_Registrar_Contato: PASS - Contact registration modal works, saves contact and updates status
tested_features.TEST_8_Modal_Alterar_Status: PASS - Status change modal works with all status options

backend_api_tests.list_pendencias: PASS - Returns paginated list with correct structure
backend_api_tests.list_pendencias_with_status_filter: PASS - Filters work for pendente, aguardando_aluno, em_analise
backend_api_tests.get_pendencia_details: PASS - Returns full details with aluno, pedido, and histórico
backend_api_tests.assistente_can_access_pendencias: PASS - Assistente role has full access

verified_status_flow.pendente: Initial status when pendência is created
verified_status_flow.aguardando_aluno: Automatically set when first contact is registered
verified_status_flow.em_analise: Set manually when document is being analyzed
